home.offline_download: Please connect to the internet to download your initial clinical dashboard. Once downloaded, it will be available offline.
home.refresh_error: Unable to load patient data. Please pull to refresh.
home.offline_desc: Connect to the internet to sync your check-ins and get the latest updates. You are viewing cached data.

risk.optimal_msg: All vitals are stable. You are doing wonderfully today.
risk.elevated_msg: Slight irregularities detected. We kindly suggest monitoring your vitals.
risk.critical_msg: Immediate medical consultation advised based on your recent logs.

affirmations: You are doing an incredible job. Rest is a medical necessity, not a luxury.
Your body performed a miracle. Give it time to heal.
It is completely normal to ask for clinical or emotional support.
Every day is a step forward in your postpartum recovery.

chat.title: Clinical Check-in
chat.voice_offline_alert: Voice processing requires internet. Please type your responses manually for the offline check-in.
chat.restart_msg: Are you sure you want to completely erase today's health check-in and start over?
chat.mic_denied_msg: MATRI needs microphone access to hear you.
chat.tts_error_voice: Sorry, I had trouble processing your voice. Could you try again?
chat.tts_error_text: Sorry, I had trouble processing that. Could you try again?
chat.initial_message: Hello Mother! How are you feeling today?
chat.offline_q1: It looks like we are offline. Let's do a quick structured check-in. What was your blood pressure today? (For example, type 120/80)
chat.offline_q2: How would you describe your bleeding level today? (Type: none, mild, moderate, or heavy)
chat.offline_q3: Do you have a fever? (Type: yes or no)
chat.offline_q4: What is your pain level on a scale of 0 to 10?
chat.offline_q5: How many hours did you sleep last night?
chat.offline_q6: How is your mood today on a scale of 1 to 10?
chat.offline_q7: Thank you. Your health check-in is saved securely on your device and will sync automatically when your internet connection returns. You are safe to close the app.

comfort.title: You seem a little stressed today.
comfort.subtitle: Take a moment for yourself. You deserve it. 🌸
comfort.mind_audio: Let us take a moment to rest. Please, close your eyes... Drop your shoulders... Unclench your jaw... and listen to the sound of your own breath. You are safe. You are a wonderful mother. Everything is going to be okay.

emergency.title: MEDICAL ATTENTION ADVISED
emergency.warning: Based on your clinical logs, your symptoms indicate a potentially serious postpartum complication.
emergency.subtitle: PLEASE DO NOT IGNORE THESE SYMPTOMS.
